response:
Here's a guide to **tweets and hashtags**! 🐦

---

## 📝 TWEET
A **tweet** is a post on **X (formerly Twitter)**
- Max **280 characters**
- Can include text, images, videos, links, polls
- Can be **liked, retweeted, replied to, or quoted**

---

## # HASHTAG
A **hashtag** groups content by topic
- Starts with **#** (no spaces)
- Makes posts **searchable & discoverable**
- Example: **#MondayMotivation** ✅ vs **#Monday Motivation** ❌

---

## 💡 TIPS FOR GOOD HASHTAGS

| Do ✅ | Don't ❌ |
|-------|---------|
| Keep it short | Use too many (#1-3 is ideal) |
| Be specific | Use spaces or punctuation |
| Use trending tags | Use irrelevant tags |
| Capitalize each word | Make it too long |

---

## 🔥 EXAMPLE TWEET

> Just launched my new website! 🚀 So excited to share my work with the world. Check it out! 🌐
> **#WebDesign #NewLaunch #Excited**

---

Would you like help writing a specific tweet or finding hashtags for a topic? 😊
